nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy. Low around 50, with temperatures rising to around 52 overnight. Southeast wind around 5 mph.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: Partly sunny, with a high near 72. South southeast wind 5 to 10 mph.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 1am. Mostly cloudy. Low around 55, with temperatures rising to around 57 overnight. South wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 1pm, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a high near 66. South southeast wind 5 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
